title: The Voyage of Maelduin
description: Maelduin sails through 31 fantastic islands — the text that inspired the Voyage of St. Brendan and the Odyssey comparisons.
introduction: Maelduin sails through 31 fantastic islands — the text that inspired the Voyage of St. Brendan and the Odyssey comparisons.

translation.text: They came upon an island where the trees bore golden apples and the rivers ran with wine.
